import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-home', templateUrl: './home.component.html' }) export class HomeComponent { constructor(private router: Router) {} public goToSearch(): void { this.router.navigate(['/search']); } }

Book Bus Tickets Online

Search from hundreds of routes. Select your seats. Pay instantly. Travel worry-free.

🚌

Wide Route Coverage

Multiple routes across cities. Find the right bus for your journey.

💺

Choose Your Seat

Visual seat layout. Pick your preferred seat and reserve it instantly.

💳

Secure Payments

Simulated payment gateway. Card, UPI — fast and safe checkout.

📧

Instant Confirmation

Booking confirmation sent to your email the moment you pay.

How it works

  1. Search — Enter source, destination & travel date
  2. Select Seats — Choose from available seats on the bus
  3. Sign In — Login or create a free account
  4. Pay — Complete the dummy payment in seconds
  5. Travel — Get your confirmation and board!
